title: aquilegia viscosa subsp. hirsutissima
intro: Aquilegia viscosa subsp. hirsutissima, also known as Bear's Claw or Hooked Columbine, is a species of flowering plant in the buttercup family. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to act as a demulcent and anti-inflammatory, making it effective in soothing digestive issues and reducing pain. The health benefits of Aquilegia viscosa subsp. hirsutissima include its potential to alleviate symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome, menstrual cramps, and other gastrointestinal problems. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
